changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log_event WHERE audit_log_event_type_id = 108

changeSet.comment: Copy historical audit_event rows forward into audit_log_event with inferred audit_log_event_type_id.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO audit_log_event (audit_log_event_type_id, audit_date, user_id, audit_table, entity_id, entity_name, reason_for_change, old_value, new_value) SELECT CASE -- Login flow (types 101-103) WHEN ae.audit_table = '__user_account' AND ae.action_message = '__failed_login' THEN 101 WHEN ae.audit_table = '__user_account' AND ae.action_message = '__logged_in' THEN 102 WHEN ae.audit_table = '__user_account' AND ae.action_message = '__requested_password' THEN 103 -- User-account admin actions (type 104) and generic (105) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'user_account' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%user_profile_update%' THEN 104 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'user_account' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%password_reset%' THEN 104 WHEN ae.audit_table = '__user_account' THEN 105 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'user_account' THEN 105 -- CRF lifecycle (types 75-76, 79) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'crf' THEN 75 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'crf_version' THEN 76 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_definition_crf' THEN 79 -- Event CRF (types 77-78) + legacy data-entry types still in audit_event WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_crf' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%event_crf_started%' THEN 77 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_crf' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%sdv_unverify%' THEN 78 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_crf' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%event_crf_mark_complete%' THEN 8 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_crf' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%event_crf_reopen%' THEN 11 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'event_crf' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%event_crf_restore%' THEN 11 -- Item data — legacy type 1 (item data updated) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'item_data' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%bulk_import%' THEN 80 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'item_data' THEN 1 -- Rules + sets + actions (types 81-89) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%rule_create%' THEN 81 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%rule_update%' THEN 82 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_action' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%create%' THEN 83 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_action' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%update%' THEN 84 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_set' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%create%' THEN 85 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_set' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%schedule_update%' THEN 87 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_set' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%rules_import_commit%' THEN 88 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_set' THEN 86 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'rule_set_rule' THEN 89 -- Site + study (types 90-93) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study' AND ae.action_message LIKE 'site_%_update%' THEN 91 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study' AND ae.action_message LIKE 'site_%' THEN 90 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%study_status_change%' THEN 93 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study' THEN 92 -- Study event (type 94) + legacy event lifecycle (types 17-26) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%study_event_update%' THEN 94 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%scheduled%' THEN 17 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%completed%' THEN 19 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%removed%' THEN 23 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event' THEN 17 -- Event definitions (types 95-97) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event_definition' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%event_def_update%' THEN 97 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event_definition' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%disable%' THEN 96 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_event_definition' THEN 95 -- Group classes (types 98-99) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_group_class' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%group_class_update%' THEN 99 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_group_class' THEN 98 -- Subject (type 100) + legacy subject types (5-7) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%subject_demographics%' THEN 100 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%enrolled%' THEN 5 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%status_change%' THEN 6 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'subject' THEN 5 -- Study subjects (legacy types 2-4, 27-29) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%group%' THEN 28 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%site%' THEN 27 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_subject' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%status%' THEN 3 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'study_subject' THEN 2 -- Discrepancy notes (types 71-74) WHEN ae.audit_table = 'discrepancy_note' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%status%' THEN 73 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'discrepancy_note' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%assigned%' THEN 74 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'discrepancy_note' AND ae.action_message LIKE '%thread%' THEN 72 WHEN ae.audit_table = 'discrepancy_note' THEN 71 -- Background-job execution (types 106-107) WHEN ae.action_message LIKE '__job_fired_success%' THEN 106 WHEN ae.action_message LIKE '__job_fired_fail%' THEN 107 -- Catch-all ELSE 108 END AS audit_log_event_type_id, ae.audit_date, ae.user_id, ae.audit_table, ae.entity_id, COALESCE(aev.column_name, '') AS entity_name, COALESCE(ae.reason_for_change, '') AS reason_for_change, COALESCE(aev.old_value, '') AS old_value, COALESCE(aev.new_value, COALESCE(ae.action_message, '')) AS new_value FROM audit_event ae LEFT JOIN audit_event_values aev ON ae.audit_id = aev.audit_id;
